'''nochajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measled|measled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measled|measled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nochajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochajithi|nochajithi]] || [[word:nochajiji|nochajiji]] || [[word:nochajishi|nochajishi]] || [[word:nochajiki|nochajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochajuthuthu|nochajuthuthu]] || [[word:nochajujuju|nochajujuju]] || [[word:nochajushushu|nochajushushu]] || [[word:nochajukuku|nochajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochajuthu|nochajuthu]] || [[word:nochajuju|nochajuju]] || [[word:nochajushu|nochajushu]] || [[word:nochajuku|nochajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochajufthuf|nochajufthuf]] || [[word:nochajufjuf|nochajufjuf]] || [[word:nochajufshuf|nochajufshuf]] || [[word:nochajufkuf|nochajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochajethe|nochajethe]] || [[word:nochajeje|nochajeje]] || [[word:nochajeshe|nochajeshe]] || [[word:nochajeke|nochajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochajothotho|nochajothotho]] || [[word:nochajojojo|nochajojojo]] || [[word:nochajoshosho|nochajoshosho]] || [[word:nochajokoko|nochajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochajotho|nochajotho]] || [[word:nochajojo|nochajojo]] || [[word:nochajosho|nochajosho]] || [[word:nochajoko|nochajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochajofthof|nochajofthof]] || [[word:nochajofjof|nochajofjof]] || [[word:nochajofshof|nochajofshof]] || [[word:nochajofkof|nochajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochajïfthïf|nochajïfthïf]] || [[word:nochajïfjïf|nochajïfjïf]] || [[word:nochajïfshïf|nochajïfshïf]] || [[word:nochajïfkïf|nochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochajïfthïfthïf|nochajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nochajïfjïfjïf|nochajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nochajïfshïfshïf|nochajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nochajïfkïfkïf|nochajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochajïfthïf|nochajïfthïf]] || [[word:nochajïfjïf|nochajïfjïf]] || [[word:nochajïfshïf|nochajïfshïf]] || [[word:nochajïfkïf|nochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochajïfthïf|nochajïfthïf]] || [[word:nochajïfjïf|nochajïfjïf]] || [[word:nochajïfshïf|nochajïfshïf]] || [[word:nochajïfkïf|nochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nochajæthæ|nochajæthæ]] || [[word:nochajæjæ|nochajæjæ]] || [[word:nochajæshæ|nochajæshæ]] || [[word:nochajækæ|nochajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nochajathatha|nochajathatha]] || [[word:nochajajaja|nochajajaja]] || [[word:nochajashasha|nochajashasha]] || [[word:nochajakaka|nochajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nochajatha|nochajatha]] || [[word:nochajaja|nochajaja]] || [[word:nochajasha|nochajasha]] || [[word:nochajaka|nochajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nochajafthaf|nochajafthaf]] || [[word:nochajafjaf|nochajafjaf]] || [[word:nochajafshaf|nochajafshaf]] || [[word:nochajafkaf|nochajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nochajasha|nochajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochajshësha|nochajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochajrosha|nochajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochajmusha|nochajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochajyasha|nochajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochajnkshësha|gonochajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochajnkrosha|gonochajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochajnkmusha|gonochajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochajnkyasha|gonochajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nochachajasha|nochachajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochachajshësha|nochachajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochachajrosha|nochachajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochachajmusha|nochachajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochachajyasha|nochachajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochachajnkshësha|gonochachajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochachajnkrosha|gonochachajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochachajnkmusha|gonochachajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochachajnkyasha|gonochachajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nechæjasha|nechæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nechæjshësha|nechæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nechæjrosha|nechæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nechæjmusha|nechæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nechæjyasha|nechæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonechæjnkshësha|gonechæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonechæjnkrosha|gonechæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonechæjnkmusha|gonechæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonechæjnkyasha|gonechæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nochfajasha|nochfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nochfajshësha|nochfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nochfajrosha|nochfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nochfajmusha|nochfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nochfajyasha|nochfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonochfajnkshësha|gonochfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonochfajnkrosha|gonochfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonochfajnkmusha|gonochfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonochfajnkyasha|gonochfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
